category_sources: source_facts.description says FUSE file system for mounting to another location; current_curation.category_path lists system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bindfs; official homepage and GitHub repository are titled bindfs.
docs_sources: Official bindfs homepage has a Docs section linking bindfs --help and man 1 bindfs; official man page documents usage and options.
repo_sources: Official bindfs homepage says development takes place on GitHub and links to mpartel/bindfs; GitHub repository README points back to bindfs.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe bindfs as a FUSE filesystem for mounting a directory elsewhere while altering permissions.
